name: Alert Banner
description: Dismissible alert message for system-wide or contextual notifications.

type.description: Alert type determines color and default icon

icon.description: Override the default icon for the alert type

decision_rule: Use for system-wide messages or contextual warnings within a section. Type determines color: info (blue), success (green), warning (yellow), danger (red).

filament_equivalent.note: In Filament forms, use Placeholder with custom HTML content
